title: ICIIP -2015
content: 2015 Third International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP -2015) December 21 - 24 , 2015 Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, District Solan, Near Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA Conference Registration Deadline : 20 November, 2015 The proceedings are available at the following links: http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/mostRecentIssue.jsp?reload=true&punumber=7403799 https://www.computer.org/csdl/proceedings/iciip/2015/0148/00/index.html IEEE Conference Record number: 36160 IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1569N-CDR ; ISBN: 978-1-5090-0147-7 (CD-ROM Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1569N-ART ; ISBN: 978-1-5090-0148-4 (PDF Version) The Paper Submission for 2015 IEEE ICIIP is CLOSED Statistics of ICIIP 2015 Received total submissions: 460 Accepted submissions: 118 Acceptance rate: 25.6% Indexed at IEEEXplore: 106 No. of TPC members: 83 (from 20 different countries) The ICIIP (International Conference on Image Information Processing) conference has been a biennial Conference at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., India since 2011 with sponsorship of IEEE. The conference has become a platform for Computer Science researchers from India and abroad to exchange research results and ideas on the foundations and applications of Image Processing and related areas. The area of Imaging Science and Image Computing has grown enormously in the past decade with wide ranging applications encompassing multiple disciplines of Computer Science & Technology, Information Systems, Information Theory & Sciences, Artificial Intelligence, Cognition, Cybernetics, Medical Sciences, Mathematics, Physics and Psychology. It is primarily concerned with the process of Image generation, Visualization, Structuring of large real life image data and Analysis for classification, prediction based on machine learning, behavioral analysis and virtualization. From the perspective of computer science and information technology, the subareas of Image Processing, Computer Vision, Image security & forensics, Pattern recognition and Computer Graphics form the core areas and the Third International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP 2015) is being organized by and being held at JUIT Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., India during December 21 - 24, 2015, will cover all of these core areas. Like the previous years, the proceedings of the conference are to be published by IEEE Computer Society Press in IEEE Explore. This time, theme of the conference is ‘ Big Image Data and Machine Learning ’. However, ICIIP 2015 solicits original papers contributions in all of the related areas. The topics listed under each of these core areas is not meant to be exhaustive. The objective of the conference is to bring together researchers in the academic institutions and R&D Research Labs, working in the related fields and to use this as a forum to exchange views and ideas in these topics of current research. Technical Tracks : Image Processing Computer Graphics Pattern Recognition Computer Vision Image Security & Forensics Important Dates Paper Submission : 20 October, 2015 (CLOSED) Acceptance Notification Deadline: 31 October, 2015 Camera-Ready Manuscript Deadline: 20 November, 2015 Conference Registration Deadline: 20 November, 2015 Conference Dates: 21 - 24 December , 2015 Tutorial Proposals Due: 18 August, 2015 (CLOSED) Notification of Accepted Proposals: 5 September, 2015 Tutorial Outline/Slides Due: 15 November, 2015 Special Session Proposals Due: 5 August, 2015 (CLOSED) Notification of acceptance of special session proposals: 7 August, 2015 Organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, District Solan, Near Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA www.juit.ac.in
